title: International Coalition of Nations
description: This modpack has been created for use on the upcoming International Coalition of Nations server.
body:
This is the official modpack for the International Coalition of Nations Minecraft server. 

This modpack is currently in **Beta**. Changes should be anticipated, but this is being uploaded as a record of changes. 

Combining the factory-building and mechanical nature of Create with a handful of technology mods, this modpack *Create*s a unique political and economic landscape. Featuring tanks, airplanes, trains, factories, and more, you are free to build, explore, conquer, and trade with other nations. The official server will have a relatively small world border size, incentivising nations to trade limited resources such as AE2 templates, oil, and more! 

This pack also features a continent mod which shapes world generation to look more like Earth, since having continents separated by oceans seems like a good way to create conflict and trade. The oceans incentivise the use of trains, planes, and boats to get to other countries.

Additionally, some technology is intended to be fully gated behind other technology. This is to generally slow down progression in a way that is fair without ages. 

[Banner](https://www.planetminecraft.com/banner/international-coalition-of-nations/) created with the Planet Minecraft banner editor. Link includes crafting instructions.
![International Coalition of Nations Banner Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e19e46990cfee3b882cd9b30561dbe2026b3084.png)
